title: The Aristocrat's Otherworldly Adventure: Serving Gods Who Go Too Far
sourceNotes: Single-cour, 12 episodes. The manga (illustrated by Nini) is ongoing at 15+ volumes, current ch. ~77; AniList does not track a chapter count for the source light novel, so the manga is used as the reference here. Volume synopses confirm the 5-year training arc (vol. 5) lands at ep. 9 and Cain becoming a domain lord (vol. 6) lands at eps. 11-12, so the anime's 12 episodes cover roughly the first 6 volumes; exact chapter cut points are estimated from an average chapters-per-volume rate and should be refined via PR if a fan chapter guide surfaces.

mappings.arc: Reincarnation, the Royal Capital, and the Academy
Five Years of Training and Becoming a Domain Lord
